name: Molecular Dynamics, Inc.
description: Molecular Dynamics, Inc. was a prominent biotechnology company based in California, specializing in the development and manufacturing of advanced instrumentation and software for life sciences research. The company was widely recognized for its innovative image acquisition systems and DNA sequencing technologies, including the MegaBACE sequencer, which played a critical role in the Human Genome Project. Following a successful strategic alliance, Molecular Dynamics was acquired by Amersham Pharmacia Biotech in 1998 for approximately $256 million, eventually becoming part of the broader GE Healthcare portfolio through subsequent corporate acquisitions.
